rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EDWARD LITKE REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 13, 2018. objections were filed 7/26 (actual filing date -although 7/25 is the date on the pleading, that date was given based on when the document was uploaded) and there are additional objections awaiting filing. no later than noon on wednesday, august 8, a file stamped copy of each set of objections must be delivered to this examiner in Room 202. NOTE-->this court requires all documents be FILED 3 court days before a hearing. uploading 3 court days before the hearing is not sufficient, as the delay between uploading and filing generally means a courtesy copy cannot be delivered to the reviewing examiner in time for him or her to complete the review and prepare hearing notes.
